nws.name: Independence Day
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 8am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 92. Heat index values as high as 105. South wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
